name: German Sausage
recipeIngredient: 50 lb Fresh pork (ground) not too lean
2 oz Garlic powder (fresh garlic is best)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl and add up to 2 quarts cold water when mixing.
2. Stuff the sausage into casings using three heads of peeled, sliced, and smashed garlic placed in a pint jar filled with boiling water. Strain the garlic juice as desired before starting the sausage process.
